members.label: stairs
members.description: interior staircase with white balusters rising to second-floor balcony
members.long_form_open_description: A carpeted or painted interior staircase ascends from the left foreground up to the second-floor landing. White balusters and a dark wooden handrail are visible; several framed pictures hang on the wall alongside the stairs. The stair structure reaches into the upper portion of the image.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly above and behind the left-side couch; leads to the balcony railing above the kitchen
